normalizer_gene: total RNA (RiboGreen); GAPDH for a subset
supporting_quote: RNA was isolated from the cells and Yap1 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. ... Yap1 mRNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as percent control of the amount of Yap1 mRNA relative to untreated control cells (% UTC). [In a subset of experiments:] Yap1 mRNA levels were normalized to GAPDH content, as measured by primer probe set RTS104.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Predominant in vitro normalization = total RNA via RiboGreen (18 occurrences). A minority of in vitro experiments instead normalized Yap1 mRNA to GAPDH (primer-probe RTS104). In vivo mouse data normalized to mouse cyclophilin A. (GAPDH also appears separately as a Western-blot protein loading control - not the mRNA normalizer.) ACTB/beta-actin not used.

supporting_quote: RNA was isolated from the cells and LRRK2 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR ... LRRK2 RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the table below as percent LRRK2 RNA levels relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Predominant in vitro normalization = total RNA via RiboGreen (22 occurrences). In vivo transgenic-mouse data normalized to cyclophilin A. ACTB/beta-actin not used.

supporting_quote: ATXN1 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as percent ATXN1 RNA levels relative to untreated control cells (% control).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Predominant in vitro normalization = total RNA via RiboGreen. In vivo mouse data normalized to mouse cyclophilin A (real-time PCR on cortical brain tissue). ACTB/beta-actin not used.

supporting_quote: HTT RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Reduction of HTT RNA is presented in the tables below as percent HTT RNA relative to the amount of the HTT RNA in untreated control cells (% UTC).
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Predominant in vitro normalization = total RNA via RiboGreen (12 occurrences). In vivo mouse studies normalized human HTT to mouse cyclophilin A (primer-probe m_cyclo24). ACTB/beta-actin not used.
